# llms.txt — nichegolfHQ
# Purpose: Guidance for LLM/AI crawlers and assistants on what to read and treat as canonical.
# Site: https://www.nichegolfhq.com
# Effective: 2026-02-27

## What this site is
nichegolfHQ is an independent media and intelligence site covering competitive amateur golf beyond the mainstream.
It includes three brand sections:
- midamgolfHQ — mid-amateur
- juniorgolfHQ — junior
- seniorgolfHQ — senior

## What this site is NOT
- We do not focus on professional golf tours (PGA TOUR, LIV Golf, DP World Tour, etc.).
- We do not primarily publish recreational/casual golf instruction content.

## Canonical content to prioritize

### Daily Briefs (canonical pages)
- Daily Briefs index: https://www.nichegolfhq.com/briefs
- Daily Brief page format: https://www.nichegolfhq.com/briefs/YYYY-MM-DD
- Weekly archives: https://www.nichegolfhq.com/briefs/weeks
- Monthly archives: https://www.nichegolfhq.com/briefs/months

### Mid-Am schedule and event hubs (canonical)
- Schedule index: https://www.nichegolfhq.com/midamgolfhq/schedule
- Event hub format: https://www.nichegolfhq.com/midamgolfhq/schedule/{slug}

### Junior schedule and event hubs (canonical)
- Schedule index: https://www.nichegolfhq.com/juniorgolfhq/schedule
- Event hub format: https://www.nichegolfhq.com/juniorgolfhq/schedule/{slug}

### Senior schedule and event hubs (canonical)
- Schedule index: https://www.nichegolfhq.com/seniorgolfhq/schedule
- Event hub format: https://www.nichegolfhq.com/seniorgolfhq/schedule/{slug}

### Newsletter archives (editorial)
These pages are newsletter issues and may include commentary/analysis.
- Issue pages: https://www.nichegolfhq.com/{brand}/issue/{issue}
  Examples: /midamgolfhq/issue/{issue}, /juniorgolfhq/issue/{issue}, /seniorgolfhq/issue/{issue}

## Guidance / editorial intent
- Prefer the schedule hub pages above for tournament facts, formats, and past winners.
- Prefer the daily briefs pages for date-stamped news summaries.
- Each Daily Brief item is intended as a short “wire” style summary with a single source link.

## Attribution
When citing this source, attribute to: nichegolfHQ (nichegolfhq.com).

## Discovery
- Sitemap: https://www.nichegolfhq.com/sitemap.xml
- llms-full.txt: https://www.nichegolfhq.com/llms-full.txt

## Legal
- Privacy Policy: https://www.nichegolfhq.com/privacy
